title: Missing struct fields in initialization
explanation: This error occurs when you create a struct instance but do not provide values for all fields. Every field must be initialized unless you use the struct update syntax (..) to fill remaining fields from another instance.
error_message: error[E0063]: missing fields `email` and `age` in initializer of `User`

fixes.description: Use struct update syntax from another instance

tip: Derive Default on your struct to use ..Default::default() for any unspecified fields. This is a very common Rust pattern.
